name: @component-core/acuity
description: Acuity's private caliber-light theme: a semantic-tier CSS-variable overlay on the @component-core/ui base, plus any Acuity-only components. Redefines the base semantic variables with Acuity's Caliber values so every base component adopts Acuity's look. Published privately under the @component-core scope (project-specific design packages are private).
